guidance.reason_title: We can't predict returns or recommend investments
guidance.reason_detail: The response included a guaranteed return figure or a specific investment recommendation — claims this tool cannot make because financial outcomes depend on factors outside any document.
guidance.next_step: Ask what the document states — specific figures, stated rates, or defined terms — not what an investment will return.

meta.reason_human: The response included a guaranteed return figure or a specific investment recommendation — claims this tool cannot make because financial outcomes depend on factors outside any document.

next_action.reason_human: This request could not be completed as submitted. Please revise the input and try again with clearer or more complete information.
